use_cases: Security operations teams monitoring incident trends across categories like phishing, malware, and ransomware
IT dashboards displaying cybersecurity metrics and threat intelligence data
SOC (Security Operations Center) visualizations for incident response tracking
Risk assessment dashboards showing security incident distribution
DevOps monitoring interfaces for security event analytics
ai_summary: A cybersecurity incident report widget that renders categorized security incident data as a bar chart using the reaviz library. Displays metrics including phishing attempts, malware detections, ransomware blocks, and DDoS mitigations in a clean, modern card format with purple and teal color accents. Built for SaaS security dashboards with dark mode support and layered shadow depth for visual hierarchy.
